records.question: Which documents named Katheryn statement have a date on or after 1976-05-06 12:56:12?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
WHERE documents.document_name = 'Katheryn statement' AND documents.document_date >= '1976-05-06 12:56:12'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT document_id
FROM Documents
WHERE document_name LIKE '%Katheryn%'
AND document_date >= '1976-05-06 12:56:12'

records.question: Which documents named Review on French files dated on 1980-10-22 14:17:11 have a CV type described as excellent and are linked to an Open Project statement?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN statements ON documents.document_id = statements.statement_id
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'CV' AND ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'excellent' AND documents.document_name = 'Review on French files' AND statements.statement_details = 'Open Project' AND documents.document_date = '1980-10-22 14:17:11'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT d.document_id
FROM Documents d
JOIN Ref_Document_Types rdt ON d.Document_Type_Code = rdt.Document_Type_Code
JOIN Statements s ON d.Document_ID = s.Statement_ID
JOIN Projects p ON s.Statement_ID = p.Project_ID
WHERE d.Document_Name = 'Review on French files'
  AND d.Document_Date = '1980-10-22 14:17:11'
  AND rdt.Document_Type_Description = 'CV type described as excellent'
  AND p.Project_Details = 'Open Project'

records.pred_sql:

AND rdt.Document_Type_Name = 'CV'
AND rdt.Document_Type_Description LIKE '%excellent%'

records.question: Which documents dated on 1980-10-22 14:17:11 are classified as excellent, come from government expenses, relate to the Population Research project, and are linked to an Open Project statement?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN statements ON documents.document_id = statements.statement_id
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE statements.statement_details = 'Open Project' AND projects.project_details = 'Population Research project' AND documents_with_expenses.document_details = 'government' AND documents.document_date = '1980-10-22 14:17:11' AND ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'excellent'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT d.Document_ID
FROM Documents d
JOIN Ref_Document_Types rdt ON d.Document_Type_Code = rdt.Document_Type_Code
JOIN Documents_with_Expenses dwe ON d.Document_ID = dwe.Document_ID
JOIN Ref_Budget_Codes rbc ON dwe.Budget_Type_Code = rbc.Budget_Type_Code
JOIN Projects p ON d.Project_ID = p.Project_ID
JOIN Statements s ON d.Document_ID = s.Statement_ID
WHERE d.Document_Date = '1980-10-22 14:17:11'
AND rdt.Document_Type_Name = 'excellent'
AND rbc.Budget_Type_Description = 'government expenses'
AND p.Project_Details = 'Population Research'
AND s.Statement_Details = 'Open Project'

records.question: Which documents named Review on French files dated on 1980-10-22 14:17:11 are related to the Population Research project, have a CV type with an excellent description, include government expense details, and belong to an Open Project statement?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN statements ON documents.document_id = statements.statement_id
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'excellent' AND documents_with_expenses.document_details = 'government' AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'CV' AND projects.project_details = 'Population Research project' AND documents.document_date = '1980-10-22 14:17:11' AND documents.document_name = 'Review on French files' AND statements.statement_details = 'Open Project'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT 
    Documents.Document_ID
FROM 
    Documents
INNER JOIN 
    Projects ON Documents.Project_ID = Projects.Project_ID
INNER JOIN 
    Ref_Document_Types ON Documents.Document_Type_Code = Ref_Document_Types.Document_Type_Code
INNER JOIN 
    Documents_with_Expenses ON Documents.Document_ID = Documents_with_Expenses.Document_ID
INNER JOIN 
    Statements ON Documents.Document_ID = Statements.Statement_ID
WHERE 
    Documents.Document_Name = 'Review on French files'
    AND Documents.Document_Date = '1980-10-22 14:17:11'
    AND Projects.Project_Details = 'Population Research'
    AND Ref_Document_Types.Document_Type_Name = 'CV'
    AND Ref_Document_Types.Document_Type_Description = 'Excellent'
    AND Documents_with_Expenses.Document_Details LIKE '%Government expense%'
    AND Statements.Statement_Details = 'Open Project'
